hero.overline: Fresh Fruit · Frozen Treats · Made with Love
hero.headline: A Taste of Sunshine in Every Bite
hero.subtitle: Handcrafted mangonadas, fresh fruit cups, creamy paletas, and more — made daily with the freshest ingredients for your whole family to enjoy.
featured.headline: Our Signature Treats
featured.subtitle: The ones everyone comes back for. Handmade fresh, every single day.
featured.mangonada.description: Our signature frozen mango blend with chamoy swirl, fresh lime, and a chili-salt rim. Sweet, tangy, and refreshing.
featured.fresas.description: Fresh strawberries layered with sweet cream, a drizzle of condensed milk, and a sprinkle of granola.
featured.elote.description: Grilled corn on the cob dressed with mayo, cotija cheese, chili powder, and a squeeze of lime.
featured.bionico.description: A generous bowl of mixed fresh fruits topped with sweet cream, coconut, granola, and a honey drizzle.
services.headline: Something for Everyone
services.subtitle: From frozen treats to savory snacks, we have the perfect pick for any craving.
services.mangonadas.title: Mangonadas & Frozen Drinks
services.mangonadas.description: Our famous frozen mango blends, chamoy-drizzled cups, and refreshing fruit slushies made to order.
services.fruitCups.title: Fresh Fruit Cups
services.fruitCups.description: Seasonal fresh fruit served in cups and bowls, with your choice of toppings, chamoy, or tajin.
services.iceCream.title: Ice Cream & Paletas
services.iceCream.description: Traditional Mexican-style ice cream in a variety of flavors, plus handmade fruit paletas.
services.desserts.title: Cream Desserts
services.desserts.description: Fresas con crema, bionicos, and other creamy fruit desserts made fresh with real ingredients.
services.savory.title: Elotes & Savory Snacks
services.savory.description: Grilled corn, esquites, tostilocos, and other Mexican-style savory snacks with bold flavors.
services.drinks.title: Aguas Frescas & Drinks
services.drinks.description: Freshly made aguas frescas, horchata, jamaica, and other refreshing beverages by the cup or liter.
specials.headline: Seasonal Specials
specials.subtitle: Fresh flavors that celebrate the season. Available while they last!
specials.watermelon.description: A hollowed watermelon loaded with fresh fruit, chamoy, lime, and tajin. Perfect for sharing.
specials.sundae.description: Layers of mango ice cream, chamoy sauce, fresh mango chunks, and crunchy topping.
specials.platter.description: A generous tray of fresh seasonal fruits, sliced and ready to enjoy. Feeds 4–6 people.
about.headline: Made Fresh, Served with Heart
about.description: What started as a family dream has grown into a neighborhood favorite. We believe every cup, every cone, and every elote should be made with the same care we put into feeding our own family. Fresh ingredients, traditional recipes, and a love for bringing people together — that is what drives us every day.
about.highlight1: Fresh ingredients prepared daily — never frozen, never pre-made
about.highlight2: Family recipes passed down and perfected over generations
about.highlight3: A neighborhood favorite trusted by hundreds of local families
about.highlight4: Two convenient locations to serve our growing community
benefits.headline: The Fruteria del Sol Difference
benefits.fresh.title: Always Fresh
benefits.fresh.description: Every item is made to order with fresh, high-quality ingredients. No shortcuts, no compromises.
benefits.family.title: Family Owned
benefits.family.description: We are a family business that treats every customer like family. Warm service, every visit.
benefits.flavors.title: Bold Flavors
benefits.flavors.description: Traditional Mexican flavors with a creative twist. Sweet, savory, tangy — always delicious.
benefits.convenient.title: Quick & Convenient
benefits.convenient.description: Order ahead for pickup or delivery. Fresh treats ready when you are, no long waits.
process.headline: Ordering Made Easy
process.subtitle: Whether you stop by or order ahead, getting your favorites is simple.
process.browse.title: Browse
process.browse.description: Explore our full menu of fresh fruit treats, frozen drinks, ice cream, and savory snacks.
process.customize.title: Customize
process.customize.description: Make it yours with extra toppings, spice levels, and your favorite add-ons.
process.order.title: Order
process.order.description: Place your order for pickup, delivery, or dine-in at either of our two locations.
process.enjoy.title: Enjoy
process.enjoy.description: Made fresh to order and ready for you. The perfect treat for any day.
testimonials.headline: Loved by the Community
testimonials.maria.quote: The mangonadas here are unreal. Perfectly balanced — sweet, spicy, and tangy all at once. My kids ask to come here every weekend.
testimonials.daniel.quote: Best fresas con crema I have ever had. You can tell everything is fresh. This place is a gem and the family that runs it is so kind.
testimonials.priya.quote: We ordered the family fruit platter for a birthday party and it was a huge hit. Fresh, beautiful, and the kids loved it. Highly recommend.
cta.headline: Craving Something Fresh?
cta.subtitle: Stop by or order ahead — your next favorite treat is waiting for you.
cta.note: Available for pickup and delivery at both locations.
locations.headline: Find a Location Near You
locations.subtitle: Two convenient spots to get your favorites. Walk in or order ahead!
footer.tagline: Fresh fruit treats and frozen favorites, made with love.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Fruteria del Sol. All rights reserved.
